name: PPPFA Preferential Procurement Scoring
description: Preferential procurement scoring under the Preferential Procurement Policy Framework Act. Two systems apply by tender value: 80/20 and 90/10. The SA pack module exposes a scoring endpoint that implements the official price-points formula. Switches on the universal BOQ quality rules today; PPPFA tender-evaluation checks are on the roadmap.

systems.applies_when: tender value up to and including R50 million

price_points_formula: Ps = W * (1 - (Pt - P_min) / P_min)  where W is 80 or 90, Pt is the tender price under consideration and P_min is the lowest acceptable tender price
preference_points_basis: Up to 20 (or 10) points awarded for the procuring entity's specific goals, commonly the bidder's B-BBEE status level. Award goes to the highest total of price points plus preference points.
